description: Product Description HANDCRAFTED WOODEN INCENSE BOX Incense Storage Box INCENSE HOLDER 30 CM INDIAN SHEESHAM WOOD Enjoy your favourite incense fragrance in true style with this delightful Vine Wooden Box Incense Burner. Simply light the tip of your incense stick, blow the flame out and place in the specially designed hole then sit back and enjoy indulgent relaxation with beautiful aroma. With the option of burning two incense sticks or incense cones at the same time, you can combine your favourite fragrances to create your own unique aroma. You can even close the lid and allow the smoke to evenly drift through the intricate lattice design and gently fill your home with gorgeous scents. This incense holder is ideal for keeping your furniture safe from any unwanted burn marks or messy falling ash, and with a bottom compartment for storing your incense sticks, the Red Wooden Box Incense Burner is all you need to safely enjoy your favourite incense. ALSO BRASS CONE HOLDERS / BURNERS INSIDE THE BOX Size approx.: (L)30cm x (W)5cm x (H)6cm 305mm Length Incense Storage compartment Fretwork Wood Design Fast Despatch Stick/Cone Burner with Ash Catcher THESE INCENSE BOXES ARE HANDMADE AND BOAST OF SUPERIOR QUALITY A SPECIMEN OF HAND POLISHED CRAFTSMANSHIP Legal Disclaimer Design may vary as per stock availability
